findings: Implemented BOOT state as initial state (AM7-L2-MODE-001)
Implemented FAULT state with forced inhibit and latched fault (AM7-L2-MODE-007)
Implemented FREECAM state for manual gimbal control (AM7-L2-MODE-003)
Implemented SEARCH state for automatic target acquisition (AM7-L2-MODE-004)
Merged HOMING/LOCKED into single TRACKING state (AM7-L2-MODE-005)
Implemented ARMED state with 4 entry conditions: valid lock, stable timing, zero faults, operator authorization (AM7-L3-MODE-010)
Added state transition table and ASCII diagram to header (AM7-L3-MODE-001, AM7-L3-MODE-002)
Added FaultCode enum for fault transitions (AM7-L3-MODE-011)
recommendations: Update main.cpp to handle BOOT state initialization sequence
Add integration with hardware interlock GPIO
